summary: Comprehensive testing of Facette E-Commerce API after modular refactoring. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All tested features working correctly. Fixed security issue with /auth/me endpoint exposing password hash.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /auth/me endpoint was returning password hash - now excluded from response in deps.py get_current_user()
seed_data_creation: Created test order and test address via API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring from monolithic server.py to modular routes/ structure is complete and working. All endpoints tested: Auth (login, register, me, google), Products (CRUD, listing, filtering), Categories, CMS page-blocks, Orders (admin CRUD), Admin dashboard-stats, Customer (my-orders, my-addresses, addresses CRUD), Integration status (payment, trendyol, gib). Security fix applied: password hash no longer returned in /auth/me response.

features_tested.auth_login: PASS - Login with email/password via query params works
features_tested.products_single: PASS - Get single product by ID works
features_tested.orders_list_admin: PASS - Returns orders with admin token
features_tested.admin_dashboard_stats: PASS - Returns stats (5 orders, 231 products, 2 customers)
features_tested.integration_gib_status: PASS - Returns GIB test mode status
features_tested.frontend_homepage: PASS - Loads with hero banner and navigation
features_tested.frontend_login_page: PASS - Login form with data-testid attributes
features_tested.frontend_login_flow: PASS - Login redirects to /hesabim with success toast
features_tested.frontend_admin_panel: PASS - Dashboard with stats, charts, recent orders

security_fixes_applied.fix: Added 'password': 0 to MongoDB projection to exclude password from response
